events.label: reasoning
events.text: The crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge. This means the crimp is non-compliant - either over-crimped or under-crimped. PEX crimp connections must pass go/no-go gauge per manufacturer specs and IPC. This is a defective installation that needs rework.

    "PEX crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge — connection is over-crimped or under-crimped and does not meet manufacturer or code acceptance criteria",

  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out and re-terminate the affected PEX connection with a new fitting and crimp ring",
    "Re-test the new crimp with go/no-go gauge before proceeding",

  ],
  "rationale": "A crimp ring that fails the go/no-go gauge is a non-compliant PEX connection. IPC and PEX manufacturer specifications require crimped joints to be verified with the manufacturer's go/no-go gauge; a failing joint is defective and must be reworked before rough-in is accepted.",

    "IPC (PEX installation and joint requirements)",
    "PEX manufacturer specifications (crimp ring go/no-go gauge acceptance)"
